Back to LUMIO home

GEO for local service businesses.

Local service businesses need AI assistants to understand the same things a customer needs: where the business serves, what it does, who it is for, what proof exists and how to enquire.

1. Entity and region.
Name, category, service region, languages, contact route and official source pages.
2. Offer and fit.
Who the service is for, what problem it solves and what a good enquiry looks like.
3. Proof and boundaries.
Live work, case pages, visible scope and client-approved evidence. Do not invent results.
4. Answer coverage.
Pages that answer buyer questions, comparison questions, cost questions and AI-readiness questions.
5. Monitoring.
Regular prompt tests to see whether AI assistants describe the business correctly and cite the right sources.

LUMIO applies this through GEO Region Evidence, case pages, answer pages and prompt monitoring.
